purpose: Establish the Martian landscape, world-building lore, and the grim news regarding Dejah Thoris.
summary: Carter travels through highly advanced agricultural tracts, observing the sophisticated irrigation systems of Mars. During his journey, he receives word from a noble that Dejah Thoris is presumed dead following recent conflicts with Tharks and Warhoons.
production_intent: Establish the scale of Martian civilization through advanced irrigation infrastructure and transition the protagonist from curiosity regarding the landscape to profound grief upon receiving news of Dejah Thoris's death.
scene_short_description: A traveler moves through advanced irrigation systems across vast cultivated Martian plains.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Massive infrastructure dwarfing the lone human traveler.
scene_start_state: Carter observing the scale of the advanced agricultural tracts.
scene_end_state: Carter processing the news of Dejah Thoris's presumed death.
dominant_action_line: Carter travels through irrigated fields and receives grim news via off-screen dialogue.
scene_spatial_layout: Expansive open plains with structured irrigation channels
character_spatial_map: john_carter moving through the mid-ground of the agricultural tracts
Martian Noble (off-screen/dialogue) existing as an external auditory presence
beat_transition_map: BT001 -> BT002: Visual awe to auditory interruption
BT002 -> BT003: Auditory news to internal emotional collapse

environments_required.label: Cultivated agricultural tracts between the polar ice caps and Zodanga

beat_list.action_end: Carter pausing to look at irrigation

beat_list.action_start: Carter hears the name Dejah Thoris

planned_shots.planned_shot_moment_summary: Carter views the vast irrigation systems

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the scale of Martian civilization through advanced irrigation infrastructure and transition the protagonist from curiosity regarding the landscape to profound grief upon receiving news of Dejah Thoris's death.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Martian Noble (off-screen/dialogue)

## Required Environments
- martian_agricultural_tracts

## Continuity Constraints
- Travel progression and distance across plains
- Lighting consistency across vast agricultural tracts

## Beat List
- BT001: Observation of Martian infrastructure
- BT002: Receipt of news
- BT003: Emotional realization of Dejah Thoris's death
